alkylation reagent: alkylated with iodoacetamide (20 mM, 37 °C for 30 min)
alkylation concentration: alkylated with iodoacetamide (20 mM, 37 °C for 30 min)
cleavage agent: 2 μg Trypsin Gold (Promega, Madison, USA) in PBS
enrichment method: incubated with streptavidin agarose slurry (Sigma-Aldrich, 170 μL)
instrument: Data was acquired using a NanoAcquity UPLC (Waters Corporation, Milford, MA) coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, MA) mass spectrometer.
labeling: Citrullination is a posttranslational modification of arginines.
